titleStmt.title: SII 19.67: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 67. (A.R. No. 92 of 1925.) KĪḺAIYŪR, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VĒDAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to a Vishṇu temple dedicated to Tirukkadavuḍaiya Niṉṟa-Nārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ, to which a certain Tūppil Chaṭṭikumāra-Baṭṭaṉ residing at Śrī Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the north bank, is stated to have made a gift of 5 kaḻañju of gold in the third year of the king. This grew to 8 kaḻañju in the 7th year, when the assembly of Tiruvaḻundūr took it over from the temple and agreed to supply for offerings to the god, 2 nāḻi of ghee on every amāvāsyā day of the month, out of the annual interest thereon of 2 mañjāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ko
pparakesarivarmaṟkku yāṇ
ṭu 3- ṟāvatu tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu
brahmadeyam tiruvaḻuntūr ti
rukkatavuṭaiya Emperumānukku
candrātittaval neyyamutu ce
vippataṟku vaṭakarai śrīviranārāyaṇa
ccatuppetimaṅkalattu śrīviranārāya
ṇaceri Emperumānṉaṭiyāna tū
ppil caṭṭikumārapaṭṭaṉ Avva Āṇ
ṭil māsattu Amāvāsaitoṟum Iru
nāḻi neyyamutu cevippataṟku Iccaṭṭiku
mārapaṭṭaṉ vaitta poṉ Aiñkaḻañcil vo
tta poṉ Eṇkaḻañcu Eṇkaḻañcum
vāṅki śrīpaṇṭāram pukkamaiyāl Ippoṉṉukku
tiṅkaḷ kaḻaiñciṉvāy palicai poṉ vāka
vaṉta pon Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyālum tiṅkaḷ Irunā
ḻi ney Eḻāvatu Āṇṭu śrīkāra
vāre tirukkatavuṭaiya niṉṟanārāyaṇasva
mija neyyamutu cevippatāka paṇittu kuṭuttom
mahāsabhayom Itu śrīvaiṣṇavar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.67 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
